overview: Dietary Assistant is a production-ready AI-powered SaaS diet coaching app with full safety and legal compliance features, including medical disclaimers, AI safety guardrails, payment transparency, data protection controls, and DPDP Act 2023 compliance.
features: Medical disclaimers on signup, chat, and footer
AI safety guardrails (no medical advice, no cure/guarantee language)
Payment transparency with refund policy and support email
Delete Account option with confirmation modal
User consent checkbox required before signup
